figures.caption: Figure 3: Illustration of the case D = 4. Left: a transitive realization of the random 4- regular graph Rn on [n] (for n = 8). Middle: a non-transitive realization of the random 4-regular graph Rn on [n] (for n = 8). Right: the local weak limit of {Rn}n∈N given by the infinite 4-regular tree T4 with a root (red).
